# Notifications service — PRD

## Scale
The service must support 10,000 concurrent users at launch and sustain a p95 latency below 300 ms. Peak send volume is 2,000,000 notifications per day.

## Delivery
We will delight users with a seamless, best-in-class notification experience that feels magical.

## Open questions
The authentication mechanism will be determined later. The data retention window is still under discussion with legal.
